text:
was a in the Scout Regiment Fourth Squad under the command of Hange Zoë.

Appearance

Lauda had brown eyes and neck-length brown hair that he kept tied back with shaggy bangs in the front. He was only ever seen wearing the typical uniform of the Scout Regiment.

Personality

Lauda was a brave and conditioned soldier, demonstrated by the way he took charge of Team 2 under Hange's orders.

Story

Clash of the Titans arc

After Bertholdt Hoover and Reiner Braun betray the Scout Regiment and attempt to kidnap Eren Jaeger and Ymir, Hange attacks Bertholdt, leaving Lauda in charge of Team 2.

Legacy

War for Paradis arc

When Hange decides to oppose Eren's plan to destroy the world beyond the Walls, Lauda is one of the soldiers remembered while Hange tries to convince Jean and Mikasa that their fallen comrades would not support destroying the world.
